report.summary: Built 2 new learn guides: MiCA EU Crypto Regulation Guide 2026 and Distributed Validator Technology (DVT) Guide, with full SEO optimization, structured data, and FAQ schemas.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: MiCA EU Regulation: Fully effective Dec 30 2024, CASP compliance deadline July 1 2026, USDT delisted from major EU exchanges (Coinbase, Binance, Kraken), 14 exchanges authorized as CASPs, stablecoin 60% European bank reserve requirement, member state grandfathering variations (18/12/6 months)

Distributed Validator Technology (DVT): Splits validator keys across multiple nodes for fault tolerance, SSV Network has 1.1M+ staked ETH with 800+ operators and 38K validators, Obol Network has 258K ETH via EtherFi, Vitalik proposed native DVT integration into Ethereum consensus layer, Lido uses Obol DVT for portion of validators, addresses centralization (Lido + Coinbase = 46% of ETH staking)

sections.title: Content Created
items: MiCA EU Crypto Regulation Guide 2026: ~2800 word comprehensive guide covering implementation timeline, stablecoin rules (EMT/ART), CASP licensing, USDT impact, MiCA-compliant alternatives table, member state differences, user preparation steps, 6 FAQs

Distributed Validator Technology (DVT) Guide: ~2600 word guide covering how DVT works (threshold signing, key splitting), Obol Network deep dive, SSV Network deep dive, Obol vs SSV comparison table, DVT-Lite & future proposals, Vitalik's native DVT vision, staking with DVT guide, risks & considerations, 6 FAQs

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: MiCA page: Title 'MiCA Regulation Guide 2026 — EU Crypto Rules Explained', target keywords: MiCA regulation, EU crypto regulation 2026, MiCA compliance, articleSchema + faqSchema (6 Qs), OG article type with publishedTime, internal links to /learn/crypto-regulations-2026, /learn/stablecoin-comparison, /tools/converter, /exchanges

DVT page: Title 'DVT Guide 2026 — Distributed Validator Technology Explained', target keywords: distributed validator technology, DVT ethereum, Obol Network, SSV Network, articleSchema + faqSchema (6 Qs), OG article type with publishedTime, internal links to /learn/validator-staking-guide, /tools/staking-apy, /ecosystem/eigenlayer, /ecosystem/lido
Both pages added to PUBLISHED_PAGES in published-pages.ts (batch 10)
